name: BACKFILL 3 - Calendly Historical Events → Notion Meetings + Contacts (One-Time)

nodes.name: Run Backfill
nodes.notes: Click 'Execute Workflow' to pull ALL historical Calendly events from the past 3 months and sync them to Notion. No manual export needed — calls the Calendly API directly.

nodes.name: Get Calendly User
nodes.notes: Gets the authenticated Calendly user URI, needed for listing events.

nodes.name: Set Date Range (3 months)
nodes.notes: Sets the date range to pull the last 3 months of Calendly events. Adjust threeMonthsAgo if you need a different range.

nodes.name: List All Calendly Events
nodes.notes: Pulls up to 100 scheduled events from Calendly. If you have more than 100 events, you'll need to handle pagination (use next_page_token from the response).

nodes.name: Split Events
nodes.notes: Converts the events collection into individual items. Auto-categorizes each event (Discovery, Audit, Onboarding, Check-In, Other) using the same logic as STEP8.

nodes.name: Loop Events
nodes.notes: Processes one event at a time to respect API rate limits.

nodes.name: Get Event Invitees
nodes.notes: Gets the invitees for each event (name, email). Needed to match against Notion contacts.

nodes.name: Extract Invitee Data
nodes.notes: Extracts the first invitee's name, email, and any custom question answers from the Calendly event.

nodes.name: Find Notion Contact
nodes.notes: Finds the contact in Notion by email or name.

nodes.name: Determine Status + Meeting Type
nodes.notes: Checks if the meeting already happened (→ Meeting Held) or is upcoming (→ Meeting Booked). Only advances status forward.

nodes.name: Create Notion Meeting Record
nodes.notes: Creates a meeting record in Notion Meetings DB linked to the contact. Uses same schema as STEP8.

nodes.name: Update Contact Status
nodes.notes: Updates the contact's Call Booked checkbox, Last Contact Date, and Status (only if advancing forward).

nodes.name: Rate Limit Delay
nodes.notes: 500ms delay between events (3 API calls per event: invitees + create meeting + update contact).
